title: Foundational Linux & Networking
description: Basic Linux commands, bash scripting, and networking fundamentals like TCP/IP and DNS.

title: Docker Containerization Fundamentals
description: Introduction to linux containers, writing efficient Dockerfiles, and utilizing image registries.

title: Advanced Kubernetes Deployment
description: Orchestrating containerized applications, configuring production clusters, and auto-scaling services.

title: AWS Cloud Practitioner Basics
description: Fundamental concepts of AWS, essential cloud deployments, S3, and EC2 basics.

title: Spring Security & OAuth2
description: Securing REST APIs, implementing JWT authentication, and integrating full OAuth2 flows.

title: Enterprise Database Optimization
description: Indexing strategies, query execution plan optimization, and handling complex Postgres/H2 setups.

title: Corporate Compliance & HR Law
description: Understanding federal regulations, employee rights, and internal HR policy drafting.

title: Effective Employee Onboarding Operations
description: Logistics and scheduling for training sequences and new-hire orientation procedures.

title: Advanced HRIS Analytics
description: Mastering Human Resources Information Systems, pulling predictive analytics, and managing databases.

title: Agile Scrum Essentials
description: Foundations of Agile project management, sprint planning, and backlog grooming.

title: Strategic Communication & Meeting Facilitation
description: Best practices for presenting roadmaps, facilitating enterprise meetings, and client interaction.

title: Python Basics for Data Science
description: Core Python programming, variables, loops, functions, and standard libraries.

title: Data Analytics with Pandas & NumPy
description: Data wrangling, cleaning, manipulation, and exploratory data analysis statistics.

title: Machine Learning Foundations
description: Supervised and unsupervised learning, regression, classification, and model evaluation (Scikit-Learn).

title: Advanced Deep Learning (PyTorch)
description: Neural networks, backpropagation, CNNs for computer vision, and building PyTorch models.
